text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 240 

SPLMTL_DSB_HCBS 

LABEL: Beneficiary HCBS Record in Supplemental Disability File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is a record in the disability and need supplemental file for this person that 
indicates one or more home- and community-based services (HCBS) conditions. 

SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_DSB_HCBS 

LONG NAME: SPLMTL_DSB_HCBS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1
